summary: Therapy — Dr. Holloway (virtual)
description: Weekly virtual CBT session with Dr. James Holloway. Zoom link in meeting details. Twilio reminder fires 15 minutes before.
creator: amanda.hayes@Finthesiss.ai

summary: Monthly budget review
description: Reconcile Chase and Fidelity balances via Plaid, confirm Christine alimony auto-draft cleared, log the month in the finance sheet in Drive.
creator: amanda.hayes@Finthesiss.ai

summary: Custody exchange at Christine's (kids to Christine)
description: Sunday exchange per parenting plan. Off-week begins after drop-off. Twilio 30-minute reminder set.
location: Christine's house, Salt Lake City, UT
creator: amanda.hayes@Finthesiss.ai

summary: Hike with Kevin — Millcreek Canyon
description: Off-week hike with Kevin Park up Millcreek. Meet at Church Fork trailhead. Rain layer, headlamps for a possible late finish.
location: Church Fork Trailhead, Millcreek Canyon, UT
creator: amanda.hayes@Finthesiss.ai

summary: Bonneville Academy fall festival with Ethan and Lily
description: School-community fall festival. Ethan wants the pumpkin catapult, Lily wants the face-painting line. Pickup at Christine's afterward is not required — custody week.
location: Bonneville Academy, 2050 E Bonneville Ln, Salt Lake City, UT 84109
creator: amanda.hayes@Finthesiss.ai

summary: Custody exchange at Christine's (kids return, custody week begins)
description: Sunday exchange per parenting plan. Custody week begins after pickup. Twilio 30-minute reminder set. Pizza night with Ethan and Lily on Friday.
location: Christine's house, Salt Lake City, UT
creator: amanda.hayes@Finthesiss.ai

summary: Lily's soccer game — Sugarhouse Park
description: Sugarhouse Rec U9 league. Field 3. Bring folding chair, water bottles, and the orange snack bag Lily calls dibs on every game.
location: Sugarhouse Park, 1330 E 2100 S, Salt Lake City, UT 84106
creator: amanda.hayes@Finthesiss.ai

summary: Pizza night with Ethan and Lily
description: Custody-week Friday tradition. Decide by 4 PM whether to make dough or order from Este.
creator: amanda.hayes@Finthesiss.ai

summary: David's birthday
description: Dad turns 69. Call him on the drive home from work, plan the Saturday dinner with Susan for the weekend.
creator: amanda.hayes@Finthesiss.ai

summary: Dinner at David and Susan's with the kids
description: Custody-week Saturday dinner in West Valley. Susan is doing pot roast. Ethan promised to bring the Lego Technic set to show Grandpa.
location: David and Susan Hayes home, West Valley City, UT
creator: amanda.hayes@Finthesiss.ai

summary: Lily's 9th birthday
description: Lily turns 9. Coordinate joint plans with Christine. Amanda hosts breakfast pancakes with sprinkles; cake at Christine's in the evening.
location: Home + Christine's house, Salt Lake City, UT
creator: amanda.hayes@Finthesiss.ai

summary: Thanksgiving at David and Susan's with the kids
description: Custody Thanksgiving per this year's rotation. Bring the sweet potato dish Susan asks for and a bottle of the Uinta pale for David.
location: David and Susan Hayes home, West Valley City, UT
creator: amanda.hayes@Finthesiss.ai

summary: Kevin's birthday
description: Kevin Park turns 43. Send a note; propose a Millcreek hike for the following weekend.
creator: amanda.hayes@Finthesiss.ai

summary: Off-week dinner with Kevin
description: Off-week Thursday. Kevin free after his kids' bedtime. Ruth's Diner in Emigration if the wait is under 20; Este as fallback.
location: Ruth's Diner, 4160 Emigration Canyon Rd, Salt Lake City, UT 84108
creator: amanda.hayes@Finthesiss.ai

summary: Solo ski tour — Big Cottonwood Canyon
description: Early-season backcountry tour. Check UAC forecast the night before, park at Cardiff Pass pullout by 09:30, turnaround at 13:00 hard.
location: Cardiff Pass Trailhead, Big Cottonwood Canyon, UT
creator: amanda.hayes@Finthesiss.ai

summary: Christmas Eve at home with Ethan and Lily
description: Custody Christmas Eve per this year's rotation. Homemade pizza tradition, one small gift each before bed.
location: Home, Sugarhouse, Salt Lake City, UT
creator: amanda.hayes@Finthesiss.ai

summary: Christmas Day handoff to Christine
description: Kids to Christine at 3 PM per custody agreement. Twilio 30-minute reminder set. Off-week begins after drop-off.
location: Christine's house, Salt Lake City, UT
creator: amanda.hayes@Finthesiss.ai

summary: Amanda's 42nd birthday — dinner with Kevin's family
description: Quiet dinner at home planned with Kevin, Rachel Park, and their two kids. Simple menu: braised short ribs, salad, the chocolate cake Susan sent the recipe for.
location: Home, Sugarhouse, Salt Lake City, UT
creator: amanda.hayes@Finthesiss.ai

summary: Ethan's 12th birthday
description: Ethan turns 12. Coordinate joint plans with Christine. Bookstore run in the morning, joint Lego Technic build with Grandpa in the afternoon.
location: Home + Christine's house, Salt Lake City, UT
creator: amanda.hayes@Finthesiss.ai
